articles.title: Brampton woman facing nearly 40 charges in series of rental fraud incidents
articles.summary: A Brampton woman is facing nearly 40 charges in connection to several incidents of rental fraud. Peel police say an investigation found the suspect allegedly advertised homes, including basement apartments, between May 2025 and Feb. 2026, for rent on various social media platforms. The alleged victims would sign rental agreements and send deposits for the […]

articles.title: Woman, 18, charged with attempted murder after teen stabbed on bus: Peel police
articles.summary: An 18-year-old woman has been charged with attempted murder after a teen was stabbed on board a transit bus in Mississauga, Ont, police say.

articles.title: Toronto's Pearson airport launching 2nd phase of multi-billion dollar construction project
articles.summary: Officials at Toronto’s Pearson International Airport launched the second phase of a multi-billion dollar construction project aimed at modernizing and expanding the facility on Tuesday.

articles.title: Toronto Pearson airport unveils new $1.5B revitalization plan for Terminals 1, 3
articles.summary: Toronto Pearson International Airport officials unveiled the second program as part of a long-term plan to revitalize Terminals 1 and 3.

articles.title: Toronto step closer to 'much needed' Liberty Village traffic and community additions
articles.summary: The City of Toronto has voted on plans to update Liberty Village's infrastructure, including a new community center, Canada Post service and school development.

articles.title: Brampton MPP accused of using public funds for ads in family newspaper, integrity commissioner reviewing
articles.summary: Ontario's integrity commissioner is reviewing allegations that a Brampton MPP used taxpayer dollars to purchase ads in a newspaper run by an immediate family member.

articles.title: Suspect arrested in 2023 shooting of security guard at Pickering casino, police say
articles.summary: A suspect has been arrested outside of Ontario in connection with the fatal shooting of Pickering casino security guard nearly three years ago, police say.
